servinfo.title: Ignition Modes and Ignition Switch Positions
servinfo.ptxt: In this manual, each ignition switch position (models with a conventional ignition switch system) and the corresponding ignition mode (models with a keyless push start system) are indicated using the following unified word / acronym preceded by “ignition”: START, ON, ACC or OFF (e.g. “ignition ON”) unless there is need to express it otherwise.
